allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat: añadir Mermaid.js al HTML para renderizar diagramas *)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\new_forge\\" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "AUDITORIA|MAESTRO|EJECUTIVO|ENTREGA-FINAL"} | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Tamaño";Expression={"{0:N0} KB" -f \($_.Length/1KB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(node -e "const {UI, GROUP_ORDER, PAGES} = require\('./data.js'\); console.log\('✓ JSON válido y cargado'\); console.log\('Total pages:', Object.keys\(PAGES\).length\); console.log\('Agentes \(14\):', Object.keys\(PAGES\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('agentes'\)\).length\); console.log\('Comandos \(2\):', Object.keys\(PAGES\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('comandos'\)\).length\); console.log\('Skills \(5\):', Object.keys\(PAGES\).filter\(k => k.startsWith\('skills'\)\).length\);")
